interpretation: Omega_3 is FLAT under HC pressure at N=20K. Range 0.9687-0.9746, spread 0.006 (sampling noise level). No phase transition. HC does not amplify Omega_3. Earlier IT-32 interpretation (0.85->0.97 amplification) was a sample-size artifact; true per-N=130K value is ~0.85, N=20K baseline is naturally ~0.97 due to smaller-sample estimator behavior.
retracted_claim: IT-32 amplification interpretation is WRONG. Omega_3 is stable under HC.
